metadata.title: Kalai Ghor — Chapainawabganj's Kalai Ruti in Rajshahi
metadata.description: Kalai Ghor in Uposhohor, Rajshahi — handmade traditional kalai ruti from black-gram & atap rice flour on an earthen tawa. Served with hasher mangsho, beef bhuna, begun bhorta.
metadata.ogTitle: Kalai Ghor — Chapainawabganj's Kalai Ruti in Rajshahi
metadata.ogDescription: The legendary handmade kalai ruti from Chapainawabganj, served at Kalai Ghor in Rajshahi. Duck curry, beef bhuna, eggplant bhorta.

hero.headline: Heritage
hero.subheadline: Handmade on an earthen tawa from black-gram & atap rice flour — a taste passed down through generations

waitBanner.label: Typical wait time
waitBanner.note: Each ruti is handmade to order — freshness takes a little time. Pre-order on WhatsApp to skip the queue.

heritageTease.title: A Heritage of Chapainawabganj
heritageTease.body: The aroma of kalai ruti on a Chapainawabganj winter morning is more than food — it's identity. Kalai Ghor brings this centuries-old Chapainawabganj craft to Rajshahi in every hand-pressed bread.

menu.title: Our Menu
menu.subtitle: Everything made fresh, by hand, to order

story.title: The Heritage of Kalai Ruti
story.subtitle: A hundred years of North Bengal's flavour
story.section1Body: Kalai ruti is a thick traditional flatbread made from black-gram (mashkalai) flour blended with atap rice flour and salt, cooked by hand on an earthen tawa. Originating from Chapainawabganj, it has become beloved across Rajshahi and Kushtia as well. Best enjoyed on a winter morning with begun bhorta, green chili mash, coriander chutney, mustard oil, and duck curry.
story.section2Body: Kalai Ghor was founded in Uposhohor, Rajshahi, dedicated to preserving this heritage bread. Even a former US Ambassador to Bangladesh made the trip to Rajshahi specifically for our kalai ruti. Tourists visiting Rajshahi make Kalai Ghor a must-stop. We now have an outlet in Dhaka as well.
story.section3Body: A remarkable quality of kalai ruti: it stays fresh for 3–4 days without refrigeration. Visitors from out of town often take a stack home.

visit.title: Find Us
visit.bestTimeBody: To beat the crowd, come on a weekday morning. Weekend evenings are the busiest — pre-order on WhatsApp if you're coming then.

reserve.title: Pre-Order
reserve.subtitle: Fill in your name, party size, and what you'd like — we'll open WhatsApp so you can confirm directly.
reserve.itemsPlaceholder: What would you like? (e.g. 4 kalai ruti, duck curry, begun bhorta)
reserve.disclaimer: Submitting generates a WhatsApp message — no account or payment needed.

gallery.title: Kalai Ghor in Pictures
gallery.subtitle: From the fire of the tawa to the dining table — every moment of Chapainawabganj's legendary kalai ruti tradition, at Kalai Ghor in Rajshahi.
